title: Project Force
description: Destruction Incarnate,a datapack that adds the destructive nature of viltrumites into the game
body:
![[Title Card]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf0e37785afe8104c9389e4dc8c4b04d37db629e.png)

### Welcome to Project Power

Project Power is a small,light datapack that adds **Viltrumites** into the game

## Powers

Viltrumites have a plethora of abilities that aid them on their quests as conquerors and rulers,such as:

- Enhanced Strength,Endurance & Durability
- Unlimited Flight
- Projectile & Explosive resistance
- **The ability to harm creative players**

and many other things

## Weaknesses

As mighty as viltrumites may seem,they also have weaknesses that can be exploited
which include

- # Poison
    Poison is one of the **4** main weaknesess of a viltrumite,poison causes a viltrumite
  to lose their otherwise characteristic trait,**Durability**, making them susceptible to
  most attacks that were previously ignored..
 
- # Wither
  Wither is a viltrumites biggest fear,as Wither effectively acts as the **Scourge Virus** for them,specifically,viltrumites lose both their **Durability** & **Strength** effectively making them just beffier flying players

- # The Void
  A Viltrumite's body can survive alot of enviroments for extended periods of time,but the void proves to be the only enviroment that could theoretically kill them,it's a matter of getting them there though..

- # Wardens
  The Last and the most violent weakness of a viltrumite,is a Warden.
Wardens are extremely strong creatures that,by their damage output alone,could kill even elite viltrumites in **seconds**,Although in extreme cases, they still prove as viable distraction,as they can blind viltrumites for some seconds,making flight tedious.

## Abilities

To go more in-depth of the viltrumite moveset,Viltrumites have **2** stats that they can upgrade **seperately** that synergize together.

### Physiology

The physiology of a viltrumite directly determines their durability,endurance & flight speed
allowing viltrumites to become absolute tanks and practically unkillable via normal vanilla methods.

the only way that Viltrumites level up their physiology is only though the following 3 methods:

- Surviving
  Every 10 seconds a viltrumite is alive,they gain **1 XP Point** to their physiology
 
- Damage
  Viltrumites that take **ANY** form of damage (even killing blows) **gain XP based on the amount of damage they take divided by 2.5**,so if they take 7.5 damage, they get 3 XP Points
  
- Killing
  Viltrumites also get XP For Killing Mobs,players & other viltrumites,specifics will be talked about in the **Technical** Section,but most mobs offer **1 XP Point**


with that said lets move on to 

### Strength

  Strength is a vary important part of a viltrumite,it effectively determines the amount of destruction and damage they can output to the world..or their foes.

There are only **2 ways of leveling their strength**,which are the same as in their Physiology,

- Killing
- & Surviving

there's nothing different other than strength is 50% harder to level-up (in terms of amount of xp needed)


# Technical Stuff
  Enough with the cool talk,let's get to the nerd talk

## Controls

  Controls are pretty much listed on the items that are given to you,but:


  - LMB/Attack : Punch (pretty self-explanatory)
  - RMB/Place Block: Grab (Grabs the nearest entity infront of the user)
  > this ability also blocks the Grab ability of another viltrumites
  - LMB + Jump: Slam Attack (Throws the target downwards)
  - LMB + Crouch: Thunderclap (Explodes everything infront of the user,due to compressing air inbetween their hands)

  That's for the attacks using the designated item.
  For flight:

  - Sprint + on air: Levitation
  - Sprint + Crouch: Launch or can be used as a Continious Dash on the Ground
  - Forward + Flying: Acceleration + Destroy everything that's infront of the user
  > Note: Extreme speeds through extremely dense objects may prove annoying due to latency limitations
 - Backwards + Flying: Decelerate/Reverse

## Progression

Progression is intentionally tedious in this datapack,this is inorder to give normal players,or creative players and edge over baby viltrumites,altough,progression gets exponentially easier due to viltrumites -> level up -> easier to kill stuff -> level up -> kill stuff easier --> repeat

Still,even supreme-level viltrumites are **defeatable** with correct strategies,at last,
the XP rewards of the current release of the datapack:
> NOTE: Physiology will have the PHY shorthand,whilst Strength will have STR

- ### Bosses (Ender Dragon,Wither,Elden Guardian & Warden)
  **100 XP PHY & STR**
 
- ### Minibosses (Ravagers,Iron Golems, illusioners & Evokers)
  **15 STR XP** | **5 PHY XP**
 
- ### Fodder (All hostile mobs)
  **1 XP PHY & STR**
 
- ### Other Viltrumites
  **500 STR XP** | **200 PHY XP**
 
- ### Other Non-Viltrumite Players
  **20 XP PHY & STR**

As you can see,viltrumite on viltrumite is the most productive way of progressing through levels,although it's very violent and destructive (as you can imagine)

so let's see the details

### XP and Levels

In-order to level up a stat,you have to reach the designated threshold,which requires time,effort and alot of death

for PHY it's 1000 XP to gain 1 level (no exponential growth for requirements)
and for STR it's 1500 XP


Although strength is longer to upgrade,PHY is slowed through lower XP rewards,because,to be honest,AFK-ing and generally getting kicked around isnt something to reward

## Gameplay

The overall gameplay of the game remains the same,progress through the game,do what you want,etc etc..

Getting viltrumite abilities,requires /op to do so,by using the /function pf:misc/getpowers
BUT,if demand is proven enough,i'll update the datapack to add a sligthly vanilla-friendly way of getting viltrumite powers

Anyway,the commands that players can use are the following:

/trigger PF.CheckLevel <- Shows the current viltrumite XP,levels & etc

/trigger PF.Give_up_powers <- Have the fists on your mainhand nad your PHY on your Chest and run this to clear yourself of the viltrumite powers

### Misc

IF you want to skip some progression,
do NOT change the score of the levels,only the xp,as the levels scoreboard is only for utility reasons,not functionality.

> _**If you use this datapack with your friends in a server, HAVE A BACKUP, unless you dont care.
this datapack can get destructive as flight and fights cause alot of explosions and WILL grief your world,use at your own risk**_
